text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy, today is the day you, the sage of tomes,
were ushered into our world.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, this calls for a celebration! Your overlord
bestows blessings upon you!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you very much, Opera O. Your words
are more than enough for me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense, trifling words are nowhere near
enough. Besides, I am indebted to you for saving
me from being suffocated by a book when I fell
asleep reading.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: As such, we will be celebrating! Name your favorite epic, Rob Roy, and I shall perform it for you!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I can pick any epic? Then I'll take you up
on that offer.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Let's see... Um, can I request a verse from the Song of Roland?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haha, the Song of Roland, is it? Just leave it to me! And... scene!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Roland is surrounded by enemies from all
sides! Yet in his very moment of need, a savior
appears—one by the name of T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Go forth, Opera O! Smite the enemy, Opera O!
You too Roland, but more importantly—Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Opera O in the Song of Roland?! I've never heard this version!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: But wow... what a fresh interpretation!
